hypothesis: If REINVENT, MolMIM, and Mol-AIR are pre-trained on ChEMBL/ZINC, fine-tuned on a curated CTF dataset, and optimized with expert-encoded RL rewards, then they will generate CTF candidates with higher validity, uniqueness, internal diversity, novelty, and expert-filter pass rates (and lower FCD) than configurations lacking one or more of these steps because transferred priors and reward shaping encode CTF-relevant chemical and geometric constraints.
